best_bet.reason: You get the warmest water of the day, the gentlest surf at 1 to 2 feet, and low rip current risk, making it the safest and most comfortable choice for families and swimmers.

counties.name: New Hanover County
counties.beaches: Wrightsville Beach · Carolina Beach · Kure Beach

counties.name: Brunswick County
counties.beaches: Oak Island · Holden Beach · Ocean Isle Beach · Sunset Beach
